text:
A Fisher Bird is a small blue bird that stalks the fish on the bank of a river and waits for it to leap out of the river before catching it. They live on Zevil Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 24 

Appearance

It is a small bird with plumage and small anisodactyl feet. 

Behavior

The Fisher Bird is a bird of prey that mainly hunts freshwater fish. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

In the Fourth Phase of the 287th Hunter Exam, Gon trains himself to catch a Fisher Bird in order to steal Hisoka's number tag. After many hours of practice, he manages to catch one as it catches a fish from a river. This makes Gon develop the concept of hunting prey as it hunts its own prey. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 3, Chapter 25 

Trivia

It is reminiscent of the real-life Kingfisher.
